description: Add OG image generation for snippet pages and expand the snippet library to 12+ production-quality snippets across Splunk, React/Next.js, Python, and Bash/DevOps categories.
steps: Create app/snippets/[id]/opengraph-image.tsx following the Next.js OG image file convention from node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/03-api-reference/03-file-conventions/01-metadata/opengraph-image.md. Use ImageResponse from next/og. Generate a 1200x630 image with the snippet title, category badge, and language indicator. Style with a dark gradient background. Use process.cwd() to load a font file if desired, or use system fonts. Export alt, size, and contentType constants.

Update app/snippets/[id]/page.tsx generateMetadata to include comprehensive metadata: title, description, openGraph fields (title, description, type: article), twitter card meta (card: summary_large_image).

Create 8 new MDX snippet files in content/snippets/ to reach 12+ total (4 existing + 8 new). Each must have proper frontmatter and meaningful prose content (explanation, caveats, related links). Use multi-tab CodeTabs where appropriate (e.g., show test file alongside implementation). The new snippets: (1) splunk-latency-percentiles.mdx - SPL for latency percentile analysis, (2) splunk-deployment-tracking.mdx - SPL for deployment event correlation, (3) react-optimistic-ui.mdx - React 19 useOptimistic pattern with form, (4) nextjs-server-action-form.mdx - Next.js server action with validation, (5) python-async-api-client.mdx - aiohttp-based async client with retry, (6) python-retry-decorator.mdx - configurable retry decorator with exponential backoff, (7) bash-docker-healthcheck.mdx - Docker healthcheck script with multiple checks, (8) bash-git-hook-setup.mdx - pre-commit hook installer script.
Ensure each new MDX snippet has appropriate tags (e.g., production-ready, react-19, splunk-cloud, async, devops, docker, git).
Run npm run build to verify all 12+ snippet pages generate statically and OG images are produced.
acceptance_criteria: npm run build succeeds with 12+ snippet routes listed in the build output
npm run lint passes with no errors
OG image route generates at build time for each snippet page
Each new snippet has meaningful frontmatter (title, description, category, language, tags, dates)
Each new snippet has prose content (not just a code block) with explanation and context
At least one snippet uses multi-tab CodeTabs to show code + test or code + usage
Tags are diverse and relevant (production-ready, react-19, splunk-cloud, async, devops, docker, git, etc.)
verification: npm run build - confirm 12+ snippet routes plus OG image routes in build output
npm run lint - confirm no lint errors
findings: 1. Bash scripts in codeBlocks template literals require escaping ${...} as \${...} to prevent JavaScript template literal interpolation. Plain $variable references (without braces) are fine. 2. Adding generateStaticParams export to opengraph-image.tsx is needed for static OG image generation at build time. Without it, the route renders dynamically. 3. The metadataBase warning is non-critical - it defaults to http://localhost:3000 for resolving relative OG image URLs. 4. Build produces 29 static pages total: 12 snippet pages + 12 OG images + home + not-found + snippets index + 2 others.
